title: Auto script analysis with review flow
description: When saving a script on an empty project (no characters, no locations, no time_slots) with API configured, auto-trigger script analysis. Enhance the analysis results dialog: (1) add time slot 'add' buttons, (2) add 'Add All' button for bulk entity addition, (3) convert direct_facts to pending Deductions instead of Facts so they enter the review flow, (4) show friendly message when API not configured. Key files: src/ui/pages/scripts.py, src/ui/state.py (may need batch add helpers).

title: Settings page API config optimization
description: Improve the Settings page API configuration: (1) Add provider preset buttons (OpenAI https://api.openai.com/v1, Ollama http://localhost:11434/v1, DeepSeek https://api.deepseek.com/v1) that auto-fill base URL. (2) Add 'Load Models' button that calls /v1/models via LLMService.list_models() and populates model dropdown. (3) Change model input to a combo selector (ui.select with new_value_mode='add') for dropdown + manual entry. (4) Allow API Key to be empty - remove mandatory checks in do_test/do_save. (5) In LLMService._ensure_client(), use fallback 'no-key' when api_key is empty. (6) Add async list_models() method to LLMService. Key files: src/ui/pages/settings.py, src/services/llm_service.py, src/services/config.py.

title: UI and flow optimization
description: UI and flow improvements: (1) In theme.py _show_create_project_dialog(), remove the time_slots input field - keep only name + optional description. (2) In manage.py, update the empty-state quickstart guidance to recommend adding scripts first, letting AI extract entities. (3) In scripts.py scripts_tab_content() and matrix.py matrix_tab_content(), add an API-not-configured banner at the top with a link/button to Settings when _is_api_configured() is False. (4) In theme.py _render_project_view(), add a badge on the Review tab showing pending deduction count from app_state.get_pending_deductions(). (5) After script analysis creates deductions, show a hint about navigating to the review tab. Key files: src/ui/theme.py, src/ui/pages/manage.py, src/ui/pages/scripts.py, src/ui/pages/matrix.py.

title: PyInstaller packaging and GitHub Actions CI/CD
description: Create packaging and CI/CD infrastructure: (1) Create build.py at project root that invokes PyInstaller with --onefile --windowed --add-data for nicegui static files, targeting main.py, output name 'puzzle-solver'. (2) In main.py, add sys.frozen/sys._MEIPASS handling for PyInstaller path resolution (before imports if needed, or in a helper). (3) Create .github/workflows/ci.yml: triggers on push/PR to main and qol branches, sets up Python 3.13 via astral-sh/setup-uv, runs pytest tests/ -v. (4) Create .github/workflows/release.yml: triggers on v* tag push, runs on windows-latest, installs deps via uv, runs build.py, creates GitHub Release and uploads dist/puzzle-solver.exe. Key files: build.py (new), main.py (modify), .github/workflows/ci.yml (new), .github/workflows/release.yml (new).

title: Final test verification
description: Run all tests to verify no regressions. Execute: .venv\Scripts\python -m pytest tests/ -v. Also verify imports work: .venv\Scripts\python -c "from src.ui.theme import create_app". Fix any test failures or import errors introduced by previous features.
